---
title: "SCuBAGear Integration — Whitepaper"
subtitle: "Connecting CISA SCuBAGear outputs to UIAO's evidence pipeline"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Whitepaper in preparation
This whitepaper is being drafted. For current SCuBAGear coverage, see the [SCuBAGear Adapter Spec](../adapter-specs/scubagear/index.qmd) and the [SCuBA evidence telemetry documentation](../compliance/evidence-telemetry/index.qmd).
:::
